snippet.title: Aluth Kathawak (අලුත් කතාවක්) - Shehan Perera Official Music Video | Hedata Akuru Galapa Liyu
snippet.description:
Aluth Kathawak - Shehan Perera | Thahanam Karapu Adare | New Sinhala Songs 2021
Video Director - Ravindu Abeyrathna
Artist - Shehan Perera
Music & Melody - Hashan Thilina
Lyrics - Prasanna Kumara Dammalage
DOP / Edit & Color - Nishan B
Production - Naada Creations

මෙම ගීතය ඔබගේ ප්‍රියතම Ringtone එක කරගන්න 👇👇
☎Dialog :- 876041
☎Hutch :- 369281046
☎Mobitel :- 74741393
☎Etisalat :- 369281046

Lyrics 
තහනම් කරපු ආදරේ අයිතිවාසිකම්
නුඹගෙන් ලැබුව කාලේ එදා
සතුටින් මවපු හීනයේ මිහිරි මතකයන්
රිදුමක් බවට පෙරලා තියා
හැරදාලා ගියත් - හැමදා නිතරමත්
නුඹටයි පළමු තැන දුන්නේ
මේ ජීවිතේ 

අළුත් කතාවක් අරඹන්න 
හිතක් නෑ තව මං ගාව
දහස් වතාවක් හැමදාම 
කෙනෙක් නෑ වෙන සිහි වෙන්න

හැඩට අකුරු ගලපා ලියූ නොමැකෙනා වදන්
නුඹෙන් පිරුණු මාගේ හිත් පොතේ
පිටුව පිටුව ගලවාලනු කෙලෙසකින්ද මං
වෙනස් වෙන්න හිතලා නුඹ වගේ

නොදැනි තෙමෙන දෑසේ රැඳී කාලෙකට කලින්
ඇවිත් උන්නෙ කවුදෝ නුඹ වගේ
කියපු කරපු හැමදේ ඉතින් අතීතයට නම්
පැතුම් පිරුවෙ ඇයිදෝ මේ හිතේ

snippet.title: Israel Unrest: Hamas launches rocket attack on Tel Aviv
snippet.description:
Tensions between Israel and Hamas have further escalated, with Hamas firing 130 rockets towards the city of Tel Aviv.

Health officials in Gaza said 28 Palestinians, including nine children, had been killed in Israeli airstrikes.

To read more on how the attacks started: https://news.sky.com/story/israel-hamas-launches-rocket-attack-on-tel-aviv-12303773
For the latest developments: https://news.sky.com/topic/israel-5981

snippet.title: ‘Full-scale war’ feared as fighting between Israel and Hamas escalates amid air strikes
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

Spiralling violence between Israel and Hamas Islamists is “escalating towards a full-scale war”, the UN envoy for Middle East Peace warned on May 11, 2021. Tor Wennesland’s statement followed a day that saw the Palestinian militant group fire more than 600 rockets at Israel, which responded with hundreds of air strikes. The violence has left at least 30 Palestinians and three Israelis dead, with many more injured in the two days of fighting following rising tensions in Jerusalem at the start of the Muslim fasting month of Ramadan.

localized.title: ‘Full-scale war’ feared as fighting between Israel and Hamas escalates amid air strikes
localized.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

Spiralling violence between Israel and Hamas Islamists is “escalating towards a full-scale war”, the UN envoy for Middle East Peace warned on May 11, 2021. Tor Wennesland’s statement followed a day that saw the Palestinian militant group fire more than 600 rockets at Israel, which responded with hundreds of air strikes. The violence has left at least 30 Palestinians and three Israelis dead, with many more injured in the two days of fighting following rising tensions in Jerusalem at the start of the Muslim fasting month of Ramadan.

snippet.title: Israeli Iron Dome filmed intercepting rockets from Gaza
snippet.description:
Sirens blared in the coastal Israeli city of Ashkelon as the Iron Dome missile defence system intercepted rockets in the sky.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Despite having a high rate of success the system doesn't stop every attack and rockets fired from Gaza killed two women in Asheklon.

For the latest on Israel please visit: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/israel/

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

#israel #gaza #ashkelon

snippet.title: Nadan Man Wenuwen | නාඩන් මං වෙනුවෙන් | Amal Prasad | Official Lyrics Video 2021
snippet.description:
Nadan Man Wenuwen | නාඩන් මං වෙනුවෙන් | Amal Prasad | Official Lyrics Video 2021

Artist : Amal Prasad
Music : Amila Muthugala
Lyrics : Danushka Gunathilaka
 
Production of *Athaa* *Creations* - Milinda Harshana Jayamanne

📱 Dialog 8758645
📱 Mobitel 74741392
📱 Hutch 369876048
📱 Airtel 8880091562

Lyrics
නාඩන් මං වෙනුවෙන් මායම් දනිමි හොදින් 
පාඩම් හිතට අරන් ඉන්නේ ඔබට දුරින් 
ඔබ මට දීපු හැමදේම ආයෙත් ගත්තත් 
මතු සසරේම හමුවෙමු යළිත්

චුට්ට චුට්ට ඈත් වෙද්දි පිච්චි පිච්චි දැවුනා මා  
ප්‍රාර්ථනා කරන දෙයක් ඔයා වෙතට හිමි වේවා 
ලස්සන ඔබේ ජීවිතේම තව ලස්සන වේවා 
මං මේ හදපු පාරේ තවත් කෙනෙක් එනව වගේ තේරුණා 
හැරිලා යන්නම් ඉඩදීලා 

හැම දෙයක්ම වෙන්නේ හොඳට අන්තිමේට තේරුම් ගියා 
නින්ද නොයන රෑ පුරාම මතක අතර තනිවෙලා 
ඒ උනාට තාමත් මම ඔබේ සුවඳ විඳිනවා 
මං මේ හදපු පාරේ තවත් කෙනෙක් එනව වගේ තේරුණා 
හැරිලා යන්නම් ඉඩදීලා
©Athaa Creations

♫ Subscribe To Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/AthaaCreations
♫ Like and Follow Us On Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AthaaCreations
♫ Follow Us On TikTok : https://vm.tiktok.com/ZSqtY84j/
♫ Follow Us On Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/athaacreati...

Song URL for sharing : https://youtu.be/Uk7Fnj9QdSU

හැම දෙයක්ම වෙන්නේ හොඳට අන්තිමේට තේරුම් ගියා 
නින්ද නොයන රෑ පුරාම මතක අතර තනිවෙලා 
ඒ උනාට තාමත් මම ඔබේ සුවඳ විඳිනවා 
මං මේ හදපු පාරේ තවත් කෙනෙක් එනව වගේ තේරුණා

snippet.title: Ashawe (ආශාවේ) - Rohitha Rajapaksa, Neo ft. Dilki Uresha
snippet.description:
Vocals: Rohitha Rajapaksa &  Neo feat. Dilki Uresha 
Lyrics: Malini Liyanage & Chathura Dewmina
Produced by Neo 
Executive Producer: Rohitha Rajapaksa
Video Direction and Animation: Randy Chriz | Meraki United
Videography: Film Dragon
Color grading: Shan Alwis

A child is born, wrapped in the warmth of its mother. A pure soul yearning for the truth, the truth as true as mother's love.  But as the child grows and encounters the world, he/she may go astray; Enchanted, Seduced and Mystified into Power, Manipulation and Greed. We walk the deserts of life entangled in these three till at the end we meet with the truth once again. The truth no one can escape, the pits of death where the pure souls find life again while those who've lost themselves are chained to its depths forever...

Lyrics:

තන්හාවෙන් මත් වෙන්නේ
මායාවේ  පැටලී පැටලී
මනුදම් ගුණ නොතකන්නේ 
සිත විඳවන්නේ 
පෙර ආ කර්මේ

ලද පමණින් සැනසෙන්නේ
ආශාවේ රැහැණින් මිදිලා
ලෝ දම් නිති සුරකින්නේ
අප ගෙන යන්නේ
කරනා හොඳ වේ....

මේ ලොව එළිය දකින හැම බිළිදම 
මවු සෙනෙහස පතනව දිවි පුරාම
වැටහෙනකොට ටික ටික නැතිවෙන බව
මායාවක හිත පැටලෙයි දැන දැන

බැඳුණත් කෙතරම් මවු උණුහුමකට
ලෞකික ලොව තුල අස්ථීරයි එය
නිලතල ධනය, බලය, හට කිසි දින
වළකනු නොහැකී ලෝක ස්වභාවය

මොහොතක් නැවතී සිතන්න ඉදිරිය
අප වටකර ඇති ආශා සියල්ල
ක්ෂණයක් ඇතිනම් විනාශේ දකින්න
තණ්හා සිතමයි මුලා වන්නෙ හෙට

සිනහව කෙතරම් අරුමයක්ද ලොව
ඒයටත් මෙතරම් මැලිකම් කුමටද
සිංහල, ද්‍රවිඩ, කිතුනු, මුස්ලිම් හට
වෙනසක් නැත අස්ථීරයි ලෝකය. 

සුන්දර ලෝකයේ ලස්සන විදින්න
කාටද පුලුවන් සත්‍යම දකින්න
කෙනෙකුගෙ ජය හට සුබපතන්න
පුලුවන් හදකුයි උතුම්ම මිහිපිට

ආගමකට වත් හීලෑ නැතිනම්
සිතන්න බැරි හණමිටියො වගේනම්
මාස දවස් සති අවුරැදු ගෙවුනත්
කර්මය පලදෙන බවනම් සත්‍යක්

ජාතිය ආගම පැත්තක තියපන්
අපිටම අපිගැන හිතන්න බැරිනම්
කෙනෙක් මරා කුසගින්න නිවෙනම්
මරනින් පසු හරි විපාක දෙයි බන්

වටහා ගතයුතු සත්‍ය මෙයයි බන්
කවදා කොතැනක සැගවී සිටියත්
විපාක දියයුතු කාලය හරිනම්
කර්මය නිසැකව දෙනවලු පඩිසන්

මවු සෙනෙහස පතනව දිවි පුරාම

සුන්දර ලෝකයේ ලස්සන විදින්න

සිතන්න බැරි හණමිටියො වගේනම්

snippet.title: How Is Israel’s Iron Dome Defence System Helping It Counter Palestine’s Rocket Attacks?
snippet.description:
The Iron Dome is a ground-to-air, short-range, air defence system that neutralises rockets and missiles. The concept was born after the 2006 Israel-Lebanon War when Israel faced thousands of rockets fired by Hezbollah. Israel's Iron Dome missile defence system took years to develop and was tested in combat for the first time in April 2011. The system is designed to intercept short-range missiles and rockets coming in from Gaza.
#GazaCrisis #IsraelPalestineConflict #IronDome

snippet.title: Deadliest Israeli bombing so far marks Nakba day in Gaza | DW News
snippet.description:
The death toll continues to rise in the conflict between Israel and Hamas militants. An overnight Israeli air strike killed at least ten Palestinians in the deadliest single bombing so far. Israeli tanks have recently resumed firing on targets in Gaza City. This comes in response to hundreds of rockets fired by Hamas toward Israel last night, hitting residential areas. At least 126 people have been killed in Gaza since Monday, while in Israel at least seven have died. The conflict has now also spread to the West Bank, the larger Palestinian territory.
All throughout the day and into the night, explosions reverberated through Gaza City as Israel intensified its onslaught against Hamas. As the conflict escalates, hour by hour, Gazans are fleeing their homes with whatever they can carry. Some have come to schools run by the UN in search of a safe place.
And many Israelis, too, are living in fear. Just north of Gaza, the city of Ashkelon has been hit repeatedly by Hamas rockets.
Gaza is not Israel's only front in an intensifying conflict. In the West Bank, tensions hit new highs as Palestinians exchanged rocks and gunfire and with Israeli soldiers. For the first time this week, Palestinians died in numbers on the streets of the territory.
The United States has sent a diplomat to try and broker a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. But as flames and fighting spread across the Holy Land, peace seems like a distant prospect.
As this latest conflict rages, Palestinians are marking an older one. Today is Nakba Day, which commemorates the displacement of hundreds of thousands of Palestinian Arabs during the first Arab-Israeli war, which began on this day in 1948. Each year sees protests around the globe calling for the recognition of Palestinian nationhood.
When Britain officially withdrew from Palestine in May 1948, Jewish leaders announced the creation of a new state, to be known as Israel. 
To many Palestinians though, the day is known as Nakba, also called 'the Palestinian catastrophe.' 
What followed was a bloody conflict between Arab states and Israel, and for Palestinians a memory of displacement never forgotten. For them, Nakba, is a day rooted in historical tragedy. 
But it's symbolism is still felt strongly today, with the fight for statehood still ongoing. Many Palestinians hope that by continuing to assert their culture, it will keep the collective sense of nationhood alive and potentially undo the Nakba.
The day is normally marked with demonstrations, not just in the Palestinian territories, but all over the world. At times, the events have turned into confrontations with Israeli security forces. 
The recent unrest, sparked by the potential eviction of Palestinians from their homes by Israeli authorities, will add further fuel to the fire of those commemorating this day.
And in Germany, a vigil against antisemitism was held in Gelsenkirchen. Earlier this week demonstrators shouted anti-Jewish slogans outside the city's synagogue. But on Friday, supporters rallied in solidarity with Jewish communities. Police estimate around 300 people took part. A spokesman for Chancellor Angela Merkel said Germany will not tolerate antisemitic protests – while peaceful protests against Israel's policies were allowed. Some of those took place in other German cities such as Berlin.

localized.title: Deadliest Israeli bombing so far marks Nakba day in Gaza | DW News
localized.description:
The death toll continues to rise in the conflict between Israel and Hamas militants. An overnight Israeli air strike killed at least ten Palestinians in the deadliest single bombing so far. Israeli tanks have recently resumed firing on targets in Gaza City. This comes in response to hundreds of rockets fired by Hamas toward Israel last night, hitting residential areas. At least 126 people have been killed in Gaza since Monday, while in Israel at least seven have died. The conflict has now also spread to the West Bank, the larger Palestinian territory.
All throughout the day and into the night, explosions reverberated through Gaza City as Israel intensified its onslaught against Hamas. As the conflict escalates, hour by hour, Gazans are fleeing their homes with whatever they can carry. Some have come to schools run by the UN in search of a safe place.
And many Israelis, too, are living in fear. Just north of Gaza, the city of Ashkelon has been hit repeatedly by Hamas rockets.
Gaza is not Israel's only front in an intensifying conflict. In the West Bank, tensions hit new highs as Palestinians exchanged rocks and gunfire and with Israeli soldiers. For the first time this week, Palestinians died in numbers on the streets of the territory.
The United States has sent a diplomat to try and broker a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. But as flames and fighting spread across the Holy Land, peace seems like a distant prospect.
As this latest conflict rages, Palestinians are marking an older one. Today is Nakba Day, which commemorates the displacement of hundreds of thousands of Palestinian Arabs during the first Arab-Israeli war, which began on this day in 1948. The day is normally marked with demonstrations, not just in the Palestinian territories, but all over the world. At times, the events have turned into confrontations with Israeli security forces. 
The recent unrest, sparked by the potential eviction of Palestinians from their homes by Israeli authorities, will add further fuel to the fire of those commemorating this day.
And in Germany, a vigil against antisemitism was held in Gelsenkirchen. Earlier this week demonstrators shouted anti-Jewish slogans outside the city's synagogue. snippet.title: Palestinian militants fire hundreds of missiles at Israel after Gaza air strikes
snippet.description:
Palestinian militants fired missiles at Tel Aviv after Israel bombed multiple buildings in Gaza, including a 13-storey building, in a major escalation of violence over conflicting claims over Jerusalem.

Watch The National live on YouTube Sunday-Friday at 9 p.m. ET

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: Chaaru | Jayathu Sandaruwan New Song  | චාරූ | Official Music Video 2021 | Sahara Flash
snippet.description:
නුඹ ඉරුවත් හිත මේ තීරූ ..සුව නොවුනත් හදවත හීරූ ..මම ඔබ ගැන විමසිල්ලෙන් තවමත් චාරූ ..

Latest romantic music video "#Chaaru" sung by singer -  #JayathuSandaruwan .
The Video is Directed By #ThiwankaMihiran, Lyrics by ' Lasitha Jayaneththi Arachchige ' & Music by ' Dilshan L Silva '.

Dial Now...
For Download " #Chaaru " song as your RingIn Tone..

☎Hutch - 369415902
☎Airtel - 8880091194

▶Song Name : Chaaru
▶Artist : #JayathuSandaruwan
▶Lyrics : Lasitha Jayaneththi Arachchige
▶Music : Dilshan L Silva
▶Video Director : Thiwanka Mihiran
▶Production: #EvokeMusic

නිදුක් සුව පතා මතක් කර ඔයා 
කලේ දිනපතා මං සිතින් භාවනා
ළඟින් ඔබ තියා හිසත් අත ගගා 
ඔබේ රුව බලා මං හුඟක් සැනසුනා

නුඹ ඉරුවත් හිත මේ තීරූ 
සුව නොවුනත් හදවත හීරූ 
මම ඔබ ගැන විමසිල්ලෙන් තවමත් චාරූ//

කැමතියිද අහපු මුල් දවසට ආයේ දුවමු
ඒ කාලේ වවපු ගස් වල මල් ආයෙත් කඩමු 
සුළඟක් වී රහසේ හමලා සුවඳක් වී නාසේ ගැටිලා
හුස්මක් වී ගැඹුරේ රැඳුනා ආදරෙන් පෙරදා


නැවතීමේ ළකුණු මතකයි ඔබ මට ඉඟි කරපු
සංසාරේ පුරුදු හින්දා නෑ යන්නට පහසු 
සුළඟක් වී රහසේ හමලා සුවඳක් වී නාසේ ගැටිලා
හුස්මක් වී ගැඹුරේ රැඳුනා ආදරෙන් පෙරදා

snippet.title: Watch the moment an Israeli air strike hits the Associated Press and Al-Jazeera offices in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israeli air strikes destroyed a Gaza high-rise housing international media offices on Saturday, in an attack The Associated Press described as the latest step by the military to silence reporting from the territory.

The strike on Jala Tower came as the militant group Hamas intensified rocket fire from the besieged enclave towards Tel Aviv after a night in which Israeli air strikes killed at least 10 members of one family in a Gaza refugee camp, the deadliest strike since hostilities erupted earlier this week.

Read more: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/05/15/death-toll-rises-violence-rocks-gaza-israel-west-bank/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

snippet.title: Israel begins ground operations against Hamas in Gaza
snippet.description:
이스라엘, 7년만에 가자지구에 지상군 투입...전면전으로 확대

Israel has intensified its assault on Gaza, as Palestinian militants continue to fire rockets.
The conflict is about to see a major escalation as the Israeli military has been deployed along the edges of the Gaza Strip.
Lee Kyung-eun has the latest.

The Israel-Gaza conflict intensifies,... as Israel says it has begun ground operations in Gaza against Hamas.
Israel's military Tweeted on Friday,.. that troops have been deployed along its border,...and are currently attacking the Gaza strip.
If the forces actually cross the border,...it would be the first time,...since the 2014 war,... that Israel has entered Gaza.
The escalating tensions follow four days of airstrikes,...and rocket fire.
Israel's' military struck what it described as intelligence and business buildings,...used by Hamas militants in Gaza.
Hamas meanwhile, fired further barrages of rockets towards Israel,...saying it's "only a small part" of its capabilities.
According to Palestinian officials in Gaza, more than 1-hundred people have been killed in the four days of conflict.
Amid growing calls for de-escalation from the international community,...Hamas had previously expressed the possibility of a cease fire,... which Israel has rejected.

"....We continue striking Hamas while defending our citizens....(cut) It will take more time.
But with great firmness in offense as well as defense,...we will achieve our goal of bringing back calm to the state of Israel."

The violence has also spread to mixed Jewish and Arab communities in Israel.

"It was never like this, in this scale, never. There use to be small crimes, small fires."

"We need to live here together. Co-existence, we need to be together, partners, to be partners to each other."

The conflict was sparked by last Friday's clash between Israeli police and Palestinians in Jerusalem, where Palestinians in the east of the city are facing the threat of eviction.
Israel and Hamas have fought three wars since Hamas seized control in Gaza in 2007.
Lee Kyung-eun, Arirang News.

#Israel #Gaza #operation

📣 Arirang News(Facebook) : https://www.facebook.com/arirangtvnews
📣 Arirang News(Twitter) : https://twitter.com/arirangtvnews
📣 News Center(YouTube) : https://www.youtube.com/c/NEWSCENTER_ARIRANGTV


2021-05-14, 22:00 (KST)

snippet.title: Buildings collapse as Israel carries out hundreds of airstrikes in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israel carried out hundreds of airstrikes in Gaza into Wednesday morning, while over the same period of time Hamas fired multiple rocket barrages at Tel Aviv and the Southern city of Beer Sheva. 

One multi-story residential building, a tower reported to be housing Hamas and other media outlets in Gaza City, was totally destroyed after Israel warned occupants in advance to evacuate, and another structure was heavily damaged in airstrikes. 

An Israeli airstrike also hit a car carrying three civilians, including a woman in Gaza City, Palestinian witnesses and health officials said.

At least 53 people have been killed in Hamas-ruled Gaza and six people in Israel since the violence escalated, according to officials.

For more info, please go to https://globalnews.ca/news/7855258/gaza-israel-palestine-rocket-strikes-civilians/

snippet.title: காசாவில் சவுதி ராணுவம் இறங்கும்! துருக்கி தகவல்!! Turkey: Saudi army to Gaza | Middle East news
snippet.description:
The conflict in East Jerusalem and the Gaza Strip has prompted Arab nations to speak out in support of the Palestinians. King Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud of Saudi Arabia has stated that he is ready to extend all possible assistance to the Palestinians. Turkish state media have described what he described as "ultimate aid" as military assistance if needed. At present this trend in Saudi Arabia is viewed somewhat more deeply than is usually seen as an Arab state helping the Palestinians. One of the reasons for that is the US Middle East policy. 

Show : Paraparapu World News

Production : Paraparapu Media.

Contact info:
Mail - paraparapumedia@gmail.com 

#Turkey #Saudi #Gaza

snippet.title: Hamas continues rocket fire as Israel threatens ground attack
snippet.description:
Israel has threatened to launch a ground offensive on the occupied Gaza Strip as Hamas continued to bombard the Jewish state with rocket fire.

It came after Islamist group Hamas fired a long-range rocket towards Eilat, Israel's main tourist resort, on Thursday, which Israeli media reports said was the furthest distance a Hamas rocket had ever travelled.

EasyJet, Virgin and British Airways cancelled flights to and from Tel Aviv due to the escalating conflict that has so far claimed the lives of 103 Palestinians and seven Israelis.

Read the full story here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/05/13/israel-military-draws-plan-ground-invasion-gaza/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

#Israel #Gaza #Hamas

snippet.title: රාජපක්ෂලාට රෙද්ද උස්සන අලුත්ම බඩ්ඩ වත්සලා (කිංස්ලිගේ සැබෑ හෙලුව )
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/lrnews.ch/
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: දවස් 7න් මගේ සම සුදු කරපු ක්‍රීම් එක Rice Cream For Face | Skin Whitening & Anti Aging Rice Cream
snippet.description:
දවස් 7න් මගේ සම සුදු කරපු ක්‍රීම් එක Rice Cream For Face | Skin Whitening & Anti Aging Rice Cream

Hi everyone! 
Hope you all are doing well..

Thank you so much for watching. 
Make sure you share the video with your friends and don't forget to subscribe.

Hello everyone today in this video I am sharing with you all a very simple and highly effective home remedy to get fair, glowing, anti ageing and spotless skin. Rice cream is best for skin lightening and skin whitening.
This Rice Cream is Korean inspired and it will make your skin fair, glowing, radiant and spotless within few days and will also help in removing all your acne, blemishes, dark spots and pigmentation rapidly.
Rice Cream is perfect for daily care, due to its properties to illuminate and mattify the skin complexion. This cream helps to prevent and protect dry and sensitive skin and your skin looks revitalized, glowing, and pores are less remarkable. So what are you waiting for, use this cream soon because after this you will forget to apply expensive creams.

👉 Beji ප්‍රසංගයේ ගායනා කරන ගීත සහ Nonstop වල අඩංගු ගීත හෝ කොටස් වල මුල් ගැයුම් හිමිකාර ගායන ශිල්පීන් සහ අනෙකුත් හිමිකරුවන් හට අපගේ උපහාරය...
👉 Our Tribute To The Original Artists Of These Songs

0:00​ - Show Start (ප්‍රසංගය ආරම්භය)

55:39​ - Amila Nadeeshani (අමිලා නදීෂානි)
1:22:45​ - Beji Band Song - 2 (බැජී සංගීත කණ්ඩායමේ ගීත - 2)
1:34:16​ - Ashan Fernando (අශාන් ප්‍රනාන්දු)
1:54:55​ - Beji Band Song - 3 (බැජී සංගීත කණ්ඩායමේ ගීත - 3)
2:05:33 - Sathuta Suranga (සතුට සුරංග)
2:29:30​ - Beji Band Song - 4 (බැජී සංගීත කණ්ඩායමේ ගීත - 4)
2:36:17​ - Dimanka Wellalage (දිමංක වෙල්ලාලගේ)
2:59:10​ - Dimanka Wellalage Papare (දිමංක වෙල්ලාලගේ පපරේ)
3:00:48​ - Beji Band Song - 5 (බැජී සංගීත කණ්ඩායමේ ගීත - 5)
3:12:00​ - Nadeeka Dias (නදීක ඩයස්)
3:30:25 - Beji Band Song - 6 (බැජී සංගීත කණ්ඩායමේ ගීත  - 6)
3:41:00 - Rukshi (රුක්ෂි)
4:03:03 - Chamitha Rathnaweera (චාමිත රත්නවීර)
4:16:05 - Beji Band Song - 7 (බැජී සංගීත කණ්ඩායමේ ගීත - 7)

snippet.title: UN warns of “full-scale war” as Israel-Palestinian violence intensifies - BBC News
snippet.description:
The United Nations is warning of the risk of "full-scale war" as the clashes between Israeli forces and Palestinians continue.

Israel's Prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, warned Palestinian militants that this was just the beginning, threatening to strike with “blows they haven't dreamed of”.  

The United States is sending a senior diplomat to the Middle East to urge Israelis and Palestinians to end the violence. 

At least 65 Palestinians including 15 children and six Israelis are reported to have been killed since the fighting began.

In the past few days Palestinian militants have fired barrages of rockets  into Israel, many aimed at Tel Aviv. Israel has carried out a heavy bombardment of Gaza launching hundreds of air strikes. 

Tensions have been growing in Jerusalem, partly due to a long-running threat to evict Palestinians from their homes in occupied East Jerusalem in an area claimed by Jewish settlers. 

Sophie Raworth presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Tom Bateman in Jerusalem, Rushdi Abualouf in Gaza and Caroline Hawley.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.description:
SLVOG  අපි කිසිදු දේශපාලන ව්‍යාපාරයකට හෝ කිසිදු පෞද්ගලික ආයතනයකින් නඩත්තු නොවන අපිට ම ආවේණික දේශපාලන මතයක් දරන ව්‍යාපෘතියක් /ආයතනයක්.. ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදය මිනිසුන්ගේ අයිතිවාසිකම් සහ හඬක් නැති මිනිස්සුන්ට හඬක් දෙන්න ආරම්භ වුණු ව්‍යාපෘතියක්.. දැන්  අපි ටිකක් ලොකුයි  අපේම කියලා ප්‍රවෘත්ති විකාශයක් තියෙනවා.. ඔබ අපේ සේවය අගයන්නෙක් නම් අපේ Patreon ගිණුමට එකතු වෙන්න. අපිට බාධාවකින් තොරව ඔබට තොරතුරු දෙන්න ලොකු ශක්තියක් https://www.patreon.com/Slvlog

snippet.description:
SLVOG  අපි කිසිදු දේශපාලන ව්‍යාපාරයකට හෝ කිසිදු පෞද්ගලික ආයතනයකින් නඩත්තු නොවන අපිට ම ආවේණික දේශපාලන මතයක් දරන ව්‍යාපෘතියක් /ආයතනයක්.. ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදය මිනිසුන්ගේ අයිතිවාසිකම් සහ හඬක් නැති මිනිස්සුන්ට හඬක් දෙන්න ආරම්භ වුණු ව්‍යාපෘතියක්.. දැන්  අපි ටිකක් ලොකුයි  අපේම කියලා ප්‍රවෘත්ති විකාශයක් තියෙනවා.. ඔබ අපේ සේවය අගයන්නෙක් නම් අපේ Patreon ගිණුමට එකතු වෙන්න. අපිට බාධාවකින් තොරව ඔබට තොරතුරු දෙන්න ලොකු ශක්තියක් https://www.patreon.com/Slvlog

snippet.title: The Battles : Kasun /Lakindu/Pasindu V Janitha Nipun | Hey Ganaraya | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: Happy Birthday To Me
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Israel destroys Gaza tower housing foreign media - BBC News
snippet.description:
A tower block in Gaza, housing media organisations, including The Associated Press and Al-Jazeera, plus a number of offices and apartments, has collapsed after being hit by an Israeli strike.

The building had been evacuated beforehand after the owner received a warning by Israel in advance of the attack, Reuters news agency says.

In a statement released shortly afterwards, the Israeli military said the building housed military assets belonging to Hamas, the Palestinian militant group that rules Gaza.

Earlier, at least 10 people were killed, including children, in a strike on a refugee camp in Gaza, according to officials.

Hamas has fired dozens of rockets at cities in Israel, killing one man near Tel Aviv.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#Israel #Gaza #BBCNews

snippet.title: முதற் தடவையாக இஸ்ரேலியரை அலற வைத்த  பாலஸ்தீன தாக்குதல்கள்  !
snippet.description:
#tamilnews #Tubetamil #worldnewstamil

உலகச் செய்திகளை மிக விரைவாக உண்மைத் தன்மையுடன் வழங்கும் ஒரே ஒரு ஊடகம்​..
✔️உடனுக்குடன் செய்திகளை பெற்றுக்கொள்ள எமது Telegram & Viber குழுவில் இணைந்து கொள்ளுங்கள்.
►Telegram: https://t.me/tubetamilmedia
►Viber: http://bit.ly/3pXymDU
தொடர்புகளுக்கு :
வெளிநாடு : WhatsApp/Viber 0094779313910
இலங்கை : 0775936959
► Email id:-  Tubetamilword@gmail.com
► Subscribe: → www.youtube.com/TubeTamilTV
► Facebook → https://www.facebook.com/tubetamilmedia
https://www.facebook.com/TubeTamilTV
► Website → http://www.tubetamil.com

TubeTamil FM
► Android : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tubetamilfm.fm
► iOS : https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tubetamilfm/id1310569783
► Website : http://www.tubetamil.fm

*தமிழ் மக்களின் உண்மையின் குரல்.

*எம் தாயக உறவுகளின் வலி நிறைந்த வாழ்வை வளம்பெறச் செய்யும் சேவை.

*கலை கலாசாராம் பண்பாடு கல்வி விளையாட்டு என்ற அனைத்து விடையங்களிலும் எம் உறவுகளுக்கு தோளோடு தோள் கொடுக்கும் பயணம்.

*போரினால் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட உறவுகளுக்கு நிவாரண உதவிகள் வழங்குதல்

*வாழ்வாதார உதவிகள் வழங்குதல்.

இணையத்தால் இணைவோம் இந்த யுகத்தை வெல்வோம்.

snippet.title: The Battles : Julius Mitchell V Subhath Sanjula | Mal Madahasa (මල් මදහාස)  | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster 😛 A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

snippet.title: ✔ අපේ අම්මා රයිස් කුකර් එකේ සුවඳ හමන බිත්තර කහබත Rice can be cooked like this with eggs Apé Amma
snippet.description:
Rice can be cooked like this with eggs.   Like "Apé Amma" fan page. https://www.facebook.com/ApeAmmaFans/
Egg yellow rice Recipe. 

500g samba rice
4 eggs
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tbsp chili powder
1 1/2 tsp black pepper
3 tamarind seeds
2 small cinnamon sticks
7-8 cloves
8 cardamom

3 garlic cloves
a piece of ginger
1 B onion
2 green chilies
curry leaves & rampa
1 lemon grass
1 1/2 tsp salt
coconut oil


කීරි සම්බා ග්‍රෑම් 500යි
බිත්තර 4යි
කහ කුඩු තේ හැඳි 1/2
මිරිස් කුඩු මේස හැඳි 1 
ගම්මිරිස් තේ හැඳි 1 1/2
සියඹලා ඇට 3ක්
කුරුඳු පොතු කැලි 2ක්
කරබුනැටි 7 - 8

කරදමුංගු 8
සුදුළුෑණු බික් 3යි
ඉඟ=රු කෑල්ලක්
බී ළුෑණු ගෙඩි 1යි
අමු මිරිස් කරල් 2යි
කරපිංචා / රම්පේ
සේර ගහක්
ලුණු කුඩු තේ හැඳි 1 1/2
පොල් තෙල් 
自從知道米飯可以這樣煮，我家大米不夠吃了，挑食的孩子也搶著吃

snippet.title: புதுவகை ஆயுதத்தால் நிமிடத்திற்கு 40 ராக்கட்டுக்களை வீழ்த்துகிறது இஸ்ரேல்
snippet.description:
#tamilnews #Tubetamil #worldnewstamil

உலகச் செய்திகளை மிக விரைவாக உண்மைத் தன்மையுடன் வழங்கும் ஒரே ஒரு ஊடகம்​..
✔️உடனுக்குடன் செய்திகளை பெற்றுக்கொள்ள எமது Telegram & Viber குழுவில் இணைந்து கொள்ளுங்கள்.
►Telegram: https://t.me/tubetamilmedia
►Viber: http://bit.ly/3pXymDU
தொடர்புகளுக்கு :
வெளிநாடு : WhatsApp/Viber 0094779313910
இலங்கை : 0775936959
► Email id:-  Tubetamilword@gmail.com
► Subscribe: → www.youtube.com/TubeTamilTV
► Facebook → https://www.facebook.com/tubetamilmedia
https://www.facebook.com/TubeTamilTV
► Website → http://www.tubetamil.com

TubeTamil FM
► Android : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tubetamilfm.fm
► iOS : https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tubetamilfm/id1310569783
► Website : http://www.tubetamil.fm

*தமிழ் மக்களின் உண்மையின் குரல்.

*எம் தாயக உறவுகளின் வலி நிறைந்த வாழ்வை வளம்பெறச் செய்யும் சேவை.

*கலை கலாசாராம் பண்பாடு கல்வி விளையாட்டு என்ற அனைத்து விடையங்களிலும் எம் உறவுகளுக்கு தோளோடு தோள் கொடுக்கும் பயணம்.

*போரினால் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட உறவுகளுக்கு நிவாரண உதவிகள் வழங்குதல்

*வாழ்வாதார உதவிகள் வழங்குதல்.

இணையத்தால் இணைவோம் இந்த யுகத்தை வெல்வோம்.

snippet.title: The Battles : Nawanjana/Tiney V Thishan Shanulka | Ran Kurahan Mala (රන් කුරහන්)|The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.title: Daam (දාම්) | Episode 100 | 07th May 2021 | @Sirasa TV
snippet.description:
අමායා ,කෙවින්, බට්ටිච්චි ආදරණීය කැදැල්ලට  දැන් සතුට නිදහස ලැබි ඇත..
නමුත් මොවුන් සිතන අයුරින් නිදහසේ ජිවත් විමට හැකි වෙයිද?
නාට්‍යකරණයේ නවතම පෙරළිය දාම්...
සතියේ දිනවල රාත්‍රි 8.30 ට සිරස TV  තුළින්..

හදන්නයි හැදෙන්නයි සිරස | සිරස TV – The Peoples Channel

Hey there, foodie Pandas! Have you ever wondered what our food thinks and how it feels? Fizzy drinks damaging your teeth? snippet.title: இஸ்ரேலிய விவகாரத்துக்குள் துருக்கி வேண்டாம்! We don't want turkey | பரபரப்பு உலக செய்திகள்
snippet.description:
Many countries around the world have called for an end to the ongoing conflict in East Jerusalem and the Gaza Strip. Israel, one of the countries that has given such a voice, is making moves to prevent Turkey from getting into the matter. "We do not need to learn lessons from any other country," Israeli Defense Minister Benny Gantz told reporters on Thursday, May 13. We have all sorts of military choices to solve our problem. He has said that we will use them in Gaza to end this problem militarily.
